name: Misery Business

abilities.name: Cruel Whispers
abilities.text: After resolving an enemy attack action that targeted this model, this model may drain a (+) to move the enemy up to 3" and have it gain a Paranoia token.

abilities.name: They're Plotting Against You
abilities.text: Enemy models with a Paranoia token may not declare triggers during opposed duels with this model.

tokens.name: Paranoia
tokens.text: Referenced by Cruel Whispers ability - gained by enemy models

extraction_notes: Card shows decorative border elements and character artwork
Paranoia token is referenced in abilities but full rules text not provided on this card
